title: Aircraft hops per day
subtitle: Pick a date window and a minimum-hops threshold. Click a row in the top table to see the per-leg itinerary.

panels.query: WITH per_day AS (SELECT FlightDate AS d, Tail_Number AS tail, count() AS hops FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE FlightDate >= toDate(concat(toString({{from_year}}),'-01-01')) AND FlightDate < toDate(concat(toString({{to_year}}+1),'-01-01')) AND Cancelled=0 AND Tail_Number != '' GROUP BY d, tail HAVING hops >= {{min_hops}}) SELECT max(hops) AS max_hops, count() AS rotations, uniqExact(tail) AS tails FROM per_day

panels.title: Top 10 longest by total miles (click a row to drill)
panels.query: WITH per_day AS (SELECT FlightDate AS d, Tail_Number AS tail, Reporting_Airline AS carrier, count() AS hops, sum(Distance) AS miles FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE FlightDate >= toDate(concat(toString({{from_year}}),'-01-01')) AND FlightDate < toDate(concat(toString({{to_year}}+1),'-01-01')) AND Cancelled=0 AND Tail_Number != '' GROUP BY d, tail, carrier HAVING hops >= {{min_hops}}) SELECT toString(d) AS date, tail, carrier, hops, miles FROM per_day ORDER BY miles DESC LIMIT 10
